# Test Authoring Skill

Purpose: Produce deterministic unit-test ideas and manual play-through test cases for interactive features.

Capabilities:
- Create reproducible test sequences for game logic (pellet counts, power-up timers, projectile collisions).
- Produce manual QA checklists and pass/fail criteria.

Inputs: acceptance criteria and game logic descriptions.
Outputs: test suites (markdown) and sample unit-test pseudocode.
